summary: Required + optional content fields for arc-flash safety labels per the combined Z535.4 format + NFPA 70E §130.5(H) content requirements. Lists field order, formatting rules, and dependencies.

key_decisions.description: 8 required fields per NFPA 70E §130.5(H): nominal voltage, AFB, IE OR PPE category, required PPE, date of analysis. Plus 3 implied: equipment ID, engineer attestation, shock-approach boundaries (recommended).
Signal word → equipment-ID → nominal voltage → IE @ working distance → AFB → shock-approach (limited movable + fixed + restricted) → PPE category + clothing → date + engineer + QR.
All distance fields show both metric (mm) and imperial (inches/feet) — common UK + EU + US convention. Format: '{mm} mm ({inches} in)'.
PPE clothing description capped at 200 characters per label; longer descriptions truncate + reference PPE catalogue in supporting documentation.
QR code is OPTIONAL. Encodes project-scoped URL: <base_url>/<node_id>. Skipped if base_url not declared.

cross_references: NFPA 70E:2024 Table 130.7(C)(16) — PPE clothing per category
license_note: Field requirements are factual per the cited clauses.
